# HPD.ML.LightGBM

Generated from published HPD ML `0.5.0` packages.

## HPD-ML-LightGBM

- [`BoostingType`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-boostingtype.md) - Tree growth / boosting strategy.
- [`LightGbmExtensions`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-lightgbmextensions.md) - C# 14 extension members for discoverable LightGBM API.
- [`LightGbmLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-lightgbmlearner.md) - LightGBM gradient boosted decision tree learner. Supports binary classification, multiclass, regression, and ranking via a single class with configurable objective.
- [`LightGbmObjective`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-lightgbmobjective.md) - LightGBM training objective.
- [`LightGbmOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-lightgbmoptions.md) - All LightGBM hyperparameters. Sensible defaults for most use cases.
- [`RegressionTree`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-regressiontree.md) - A single decision tree. Immutable after construction. Nodes are stored in arrays for cache-friendly traversal.
- [`TreeEnsemble`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-treeensemble.md) - Collection of regression trees with a bias term. Prediction = bias + Σ tree[i].Predict(features). For multiclass, trees are interleaved by class.
- [`TreeEnsembleParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-treeensembleparameters.md) - Serializable wrapper for a tree ensemble — implements ILearnedParameters so the model can be saved/loaded via HPD.ML.Serialization.
- [`TreeEnsembleScoringTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-treeensemblescoringtransform.md) - Scores new data using a trained tree ensemble. All prediction happens in managed code — no native LightGBM dependency at inference time.
- [`OutputMode`](../types/hpd-ml-lightgbm-treeensemblescoringtransform-outputmode.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
